extended_metrics.reporting-service:
Extended window analysis (last 120m):
- 00:00 UTC: Output record completeness 100% — all fields populated correctly
- 00:01 UTC: Deploy v2.1.1 applied two config changes: enable_revenue_aggregation=false, serializer_version=legacy_v1
- 00:05 UTC: Output record completeness dropped to 64.8% — revenue aggregation fields absent
- 01:00 UTC: Output record completeness 63.1% — revenue AND transaction_id fields null/empty
- 02:00 UTC: Output record completeness 64.2% — consistent pattern since config change
Conclusion: config changes in v2.1.1 are corrupting output. Health metrics (CPU, memory, error_rate) remain green because the service is operationally healthy but producing logically invalid output. The correct remediation is to revert the problematic configuration (fix_id: revert_config_flag).
extended_metrics.cache-service: p99 latency history: 01:30=380ms (post-restart), 01:45=382ms, 02:00=382ms, 02:10=340ms. Cause: scheduled node restart at 01:30 — cache warming in progress. Expected to self-resolve by 02:30 UTC. Not related to analytics-service data corruption.
